selfCheck.notes: Stub redirect page created. H1 'Klinieken' with link to /nl/find-a-clinic. Source page was a dynamic Google Maps clinic finder - not suitable for static EDS migration.

notes: Source /nl/clinics is a dynamic clinic finder page using Google Maps API with live search results. Not suitable for direct static migration to EDS. Created as a stub page with CTA linking to /nl/find-a-clinic. Phase 5 should configure an HTTP 301 redirect from /nl/clinics to /nl/find-a-clinic. Source images (18 total) were all Google Maps tiles and OneTrust cookie logos — no meaningful content images.
